items.name: hero-1
items.description: A hero section with a headline, subheadline, and primary call-to-action.

items.name: auth-1
items.description: A centered sign-in card with email, password, and social login.

items.name: features-1
items.description: A feature grid highlighting product capabilities with icons.

items.name: dashboard-1
items.description: An analytics dashboard with stat cards and a bar chart.

items.name: app-shell-1
items.description: An application shell with a sidebar, top bar, and content area.

items.name: header-1
items.description: A full-width site header with logo, navigation links, a call-to-action, and a mobile menu sheet.

items.name: footer-1
items.description: A site footer with link columns, a brand blurb, and social links.

items.name: cta-1
items.description: A centered call-to-action band with a heading and buttons.

items.name: integrations-1
items.description: An integrations grid of connectable services with icons.

items.name: logo-cloud-1
items.description: A logo cloud of companies that trust the product.

items.name: faqs-1
items.description: A frequently-asked-questions accordion section.

items.name: contact-1
items.description: A contact section with contact details and a message form.

items.name: pricing-1
items.description: A pricing section with three tiers and a highlighted plan.

items.name: testimonials-1
items.description: A testimonials section with customer quote cards.

items.name: stats-1
items.description: A stats band highlighting key product metrics.

items.name: sidebar-1
items.description: An application layout with a navigable left sidebar.

items.name: settings-1
items.description: A settings page with grouped preference rows and toggles.

items.name: table-1
items.description: A data table with a toolbar, status cells, and pagination.

items.name: bento-1
items.description: A bento grid of mixed-size tiles, each with an icon, title, and short description.

items.name: how-it-works-1
items.description: A three-step 'how it works' row with numbered, iconed steps.

items.name: newsletter-1
items.description: A centered newsletter signup with an email field and subscribe button.

items.name: announcement-1
items.description: A dismissible top announcement bar with a message and an inline link.

items.name: blog-1
items.description: A three-card blog post grid with cover, title, excerpt, and author.

items.name: team-1
items.description: A team grid of member cards with avatar, name, role, and socials.

items.name: comparison-1
items.description: A three-column plan comparison table with check and cross marks.

items.name: gallery-1
items.description: A responsive image gallery grid of evenly sized tiles.

items.name: empty-states-1
items.description: An inbox-zero empty state for an empty notifications list, with an icon, title, description, and an action.

items.name: billing-1
items.description: A current-plan billing summary card with price, renewal, and usage.

items.name: ai-chat-1
items.description: An AI assistant chat thread built on the Message, Bubble, and MessageScroller components, with user and assistant bubbles, avatars, timestamps, auto-follow scrolling, and a composer.

items.name: onboarding-1
items.description: A welcome onboarding card with a step indicator and a checklist.

items.name: command-palette-1
items.description: A command palette card with search and grouped command rows.

items.name: notifications-1
items.description: A notifications panel with read/unread rows and timestamps.

items.name: kanban-1
items.description: A three-column kanban board with task cards.

items.name: calendar-1
items.description: A month calendar grid with month navigation, a Today shortcut, selectable days, and a detail panel for the selected day's event.

items.name: file-upload-1
items.description: A file upload card with a drag-and-drop dropzone and an Attachment list that shows each file with a spinner while uploading and a check when done.

items.name: charts-1
items.description: An analytics card with a bar chart built on the chart component.

items.name: bento-2
items.description: A 2x2 equal-tile bento grid with centered heading, where each tile has a square icon, a badge category label, a title, and a one-line description. All four tiles are identical in size.

items.name: how-it-works-2
items.description: A vertical left-rail timeline that stacks four numbered steps down the page, each with a bordered icon circle, a connecting line to the next step, a monospaced step counter, a bold title, and a line of supporting copy.

items.name: newsletter-2
items.description: A full-width horizontal band on a bg-muted panel with branding label, heading, and subtext on the left, and an inline email input plus subscribe button with a privacy note on the right.

items.name: announcement-2
items.description: A centered card-style product-update callout featuring a "New" badge with version label, a bold feature headline, a supporting detail sentence, release metadata, and a primary CTA button. A focused announcement panel distinct from the dismissible top-bar variant.

items.name: blog-2
items.description: A minimal blog post list showing five articles as divider-separated rows, each with category badge, date, title, excerpt, author avatar with name, and a ghost "Read more" button. No cards or cover images.

items.name: team-2
items.description: A centered single row of five team members, each showing a large avatar with name and role stacked beneath, under a heading and badge. No cards or bios.

items.name: comparison-2
items.description: A two-column "Us vs. Them" layout with two side-by-side cards. The Acme card lists check rows of product advantages with a primary CTA, while the Others card lists cross rows of competitor pain points with strikethrough text.

items.name: gallery-2
items.description: A single large browser-framed product screenshot placeholder with a version badge and descriptive caption, plus a five-thumbnail strip beneath it for secondary screens.

items.name: empty-states-2
items.description: An empty inbox state centered in a solid-bordered card panel, featuring a muted illustration placeholder with a decorative box grid and inbox icon, a title and description, plus primary and secondary (link) action buttons with a support link below a separator.

items.name: billing-2
items.description: A billing invoices card displaying a table of past invoices with invoice number, date, amount, a status badge, and a per-row download link.

items.name: ai-chat-2
items.description: An AI chat that opens on a suggested-prompt empty state, then switches to a Message and Bubble thread on MessageScroller once a prompt is sent, with a multi-line composer.

items.name: onboarding-2
items.description: A three-card horizontal setup grid where each card presents a numbered onboarding step with an icon, title, short description, and a toggleable action button to mark it complete.

items.name: command-palette-2
items.description: A command palette panel with a search input, a Recent section showing timestamped file/page rows with hover-reveal arrows, and a Results section of icon-label-category-shortcut rows with one highlighted active selection and a footer keyboard-hint bar.

items.name: notifications-2
items.description: A compact notifications dropdown panel showing a bell trigger button with an unread badge, a small header with count, four notification rows each with an avatar-plus-icon treatment and unread dot, and a "View all notifications" footer link.

items.name: kanban-2
items.description: A single "In Progress" kanban column rendered as a vertical list of rich task cards, each showing a title, two-line description, priority badge with icon, label badges, a due date, and a stacked assignee avatar group.

items.name: calendar-2
items.description: A weekly agenda view showing Mon–Sun with time-slotted event rows, color-coded status borders and dots, and prev/today/next navigation.

items.name: file-upload-2
items.description: A compact inline file-upload form field with a bordered row and a "Choose file" label-trigger, plus an Attachment showing the selected file with its name, size, and a remove action.

items.name: charts-2
items.description: An analytics card with a gradient-filled area chart showing a monthly active users trend, topped by a three-KPI summary row (total, peak month, peak count) and a YoY growth badge.

items.name: hero-2
items.description: A split two-column hero with headline, subheadline, and two CTAs on the left, and a framed product-screenshot placeholder (stat cards, bar chart, table) on the right, stacked on mobile and side-by-side on desktop.

items.name: features-2
items.description: An alternating left/right features layout with three rows, each pairing a copy block (eyebrow, title, body paragraph, and a four-item bullet list) with a decorative image placeholder, separated by horizontal dividers.

items.name: pricing-2
items.description: A two-tier pricing layout with a side-by-side split panel: a filled Pro tier on the left and a plain Starter tier on the right, each showing a price, feature checklist, and CTA. No three-column grid, no top heading section.

items.name: testimonials-2
items.description: A single featured testimonial with a large centered quote, oversized avatar, name and role, and a company logo placeholder. No cards or grid, just a focused spotlight on one voice.

items.name: stats-2
items.description: A minimal four-up stat band with oversized numbers and short labels evenly spaced under a single short heading, with no badges, dividers, or secondary copy.

items.name: logo-cloud-2
items.description: A four-column grid of brand logos, each cell a muted card showing an icon mark and label, beneath a centered heading and subtext, structured for integration showcases.

items.name: cta-2
items.description: A compact bordered card on a bg-muted panel with a heading, single line of subtext, and one full-width primary button, centered and minimal.

items.name: faqs-2
items.description: A two-column FAQ layout where each question is a collapsible accordion item, separated by border rules, letting visitors expand answers on demand across two balanced columns.

items.name: integrations-2
items.description: A dense logo grid showing 18 integration services, each as a compact card with only a service icon and name. No descriptions or call-to-action buttons.

items.name: contact-2
items.description: A centered single-card contact form with split first/last name fields, a topic selector, message textarea, and a footer privacy note. No side details column.

items.name: header-2
items.description: A three-column header with logo pinned left, nav links absolutely centred, and a sign-in link plus primary CTA on the right, above a skeleton page-content placeholder.

items.name: footer-2
items.description: A compact single-tier footer with a brand mark and tagline on the left, an inline row of navigation links in the center, and a copyright notice on the right, all in one slim bar.

items.name: auth-2
items.description: A two-column split sign-in layout with a branded feature panel on the left and a minimal email + password form on the right. No social login buttons.

items.name: sidebar-2
items.description: A flat single-list sidebar nav (icon + label + optional badge count, one active item) beside a task table content area with priority indicators and status badges.

items.name: settings-2
items.description: A compact centered Profile card with an avatar upload section, vertical form fields (name, email, job title), a two-factor authentication Switch, and Discard/Save actions in the card footer.

items.name: dashboard-2
items.description: A stat-and-activity dashboard featuring four KPI cards with trend badges and a full-width recent-activity feed showing actor avatars, event descriptions, status badges, and timestamps. No chart.

items.name: table-2
items.description: A static invoices data table showing client avatars, project names, payment methods, due dates, status badges, and right-aligned amounts with a footer total row. No toolbar or pagination.

items.name: app-shell-2
items.description: A sidebar-free app shell with a sticky top bar (logo, search, avatar dropdown) above a tabbed content area featuring project cards, a task checklist, and an activity feed.

items.name: hero-3
items.description: Left-aligned hero with headline, subheadline, two CTAs, and a compact inline stat row showing three key business metrics with icons.

items.name: features-3
items.description: A dense two-column feature checklist with a short left-aligned heading, where each item shows a filled check square, a bold label, and one short description line. An "everything included" list with no cards or images.

items.name: pricing-3
items.description: A single-plan spotlight card centered on the page, featuring a large price display, a full feature checklist, a primary CTA, and a social-proof footnote, designed for one-tier products.

items.name: cta-3
items.description: Full-width inverted CTA banner on bg-primary with a bold heading, supporting line, and a high-contrast secondary button in a horizontal split layout.

items.name: faqs-3
items.description: Two-column FAQ layout with a heading, short support CTA card on the left, and a compact single-column accordion on the right.

items.name: dashboard-3
items.description: A compact KPI strip showing six metric tiles in a flush horizontal grid, each with label, large value, and directional delta, beneath a page title and period badge, with no cards, chart, or activity list.

items.name: auth-3
items.description: A two-panel sign-up card with a plan-overview sidebar and a create-account form featuring first/last name, email, password, a terms checkbox, and a sign-in link.

items.name: table-3
items.description: A static invoice line-items table with a caption showing billed-to details, per-item qty/unit/unit-price/amount columns, and a multi-row footer with subtotal, tax, and total due.

items.name: hero-4
items.description: Centered hero over a faint grid and radial glow with eyebrow badge, headline, and inline email capture row

items.name: hero-5
items.description: Centered hero with headline, two CTAs, and a trust strip of five inline-SVG wordmark company logos

items.name: logo-cloud-3
items.description: Infinite auto-scrolling logo marquee with edge fade mask and pause-on-hover for a trusted-by section

items.name: logo-cloud-4
items.description: Bordered grid of ten muted brand logos that colorize on hover, each with a name tooltip

items.name: cta-4
items.description: Centered CTA band with heading, inline email-capture form, and a no-spam privacy note in a muted card

items.name: cta-5
items.description: Split CTA with eyebrow, heading, dual buttons, and a framed faux app-screenshot card built from divs

items.name: faqs-4
items.description: FAQ accordion with a sticky "Still have questions?" contact support card alongside

items.name: faqs-5
items.description: FAQ with category tabs and a live search input that filters questions across General, Billing and Security

items.name: footer-3
items.description: Site footer pairing a newsletter signup with grouped nav columns and a social-icon bottom bar

items.name: footer-4
items.description: Mega footer with brand column, four sitemap columns, and a bottom bar with locale switcher and theme toggle

items.name: newsletter-3
items.description: Newsletter signup Card with idle, loading, success, and error states driven by a client state machine

items.name: newsletter-4
items.description: Multi-step newsletter Card with topic toggles and a double opt-in check-your-inbox confirmation

items.name: newsletter-5
items.description: A social-proof newsletter signup centered around a subscriber avatar stack, a star rating and reader count, a headline, an inline email capture with a success state, and a trusted-by line.

items.name: announcement-3
items.description: Dismissible single-line top announcement bar that persists dismissal in localStorage, over a page placeholder

items.name: announcement-4
items.description: Sticky promo bar with a live ticking sale countdown, fire icon, and shop CTA over a faint page mock

items.name: auth-4
items.description: Split-screen sign-in with email/password fields, remember-me switch, social buttons, and a branded value-prop panel

items.name: auth-5
items.description: Tabbed auth card that swaps sign-in and sign-up fields, with social login buttons and a divider

items.name: empty-states-3
items.description: A 'no results found' search empty state with an icon, helpful guidance, and a clear-filters action, in a bordered card.

items.name: empty-states-4
items.description: An error empty state for a failed data load, with a destructive accent and retry and contact-support actions.

items.name: integrations-3
items.description: Searchable integrations directory with category filter pills and a responsive grid of connectable apps

items.name: integrations-4
items.description: Integration cards grid with per-card Connect/Connected toggle, Switch, badge and live connected count

items.name: features-4
items.description: Features section with category tabs that swap a 3-column grid of icon, title, and description cards

items.name: pricing-4
items.description: Three-tier pricing section with a monthly/annual segmented toggle and a highlighted most-popular plan

items.name: testimonials-3
items.description: A masonry wall of seven testimonial quote cards in varied heights with avatars, names, and roles

items.name: stats-4
items.description: Four-up metric band whose big numbers count up from zero with delta badges when scrolled into view

items.name: contact-3
items.description: Contact section with a message form beside a map placeholder and office location cards

items.name: header-3
items.description: Responsive sticky site header with logo, desktop nav, sign-in, a primary CTA, and a useState-toggled mobile menu sheet. Composable into page templates.

items.name: bento-4
items.description: Bento grid with a 2x2 hero tile and mixed-size supporting tiles, each with icon, text, and faint div visuals

items.name: how-it-works-3
items.description: Interactive horizontal stepper with a progress fill and clickable steps that stacks on mobile

items.name: how-it-works-4
items.description: A how-it-works section with three alternating zig-zag rows, each pairing a numbered step with a title, description, and checklist on one side and a mock UI preview panel on the other.

items.name: blog-3
items.description: Blog index with a featured post, category filter pills, and a filterable 3-column grid of post cards

items.name: blog-4
items.description: A blog index as a vertical list of horizontal media cards, each with a thumbnail image, category, read time, title, excerpt, and author. A dense archive or article-list layout.

items.name: team-3
items.description: Responsive grid of eight team member cards that reveal a bio and social links on hover

items.name: comparison-3
items.description: Feature comparison table across 3 plans with grouped sections, check/value cells, sticky header and a highlighted column

items.name: gallery-3
items.description: Masonry image gallery with CSS columns and varied-ratio placeholder tiles that reveal a caption overlay on hover

items.name: gallery-4
items.description: A featured mosaic gallery with one large hero tile and a grid of smaller tiles, hover zoom affordance, and a lightbox dialog with caption and location for each photo.

items.name: app-shell-3
items.description: App shell with a collapsible icon-rail sidebar, search top bar, avatar, and dashboard placeholder cards

items.name: sidebar-3
items.description: Collapsible icon-rail sidebar with grouped nav, badges, user footer, and tooltips when collapsed

items.name: settings-3
items.description: Tabbed settings page with Account profile fields and switch, Billing plan and payment card, and a Team members table

items.name: notifications-3
items.description: Notification center card with All/Unread/Mentions tabs, read state toggling, and a mark-all-read action

items.name: billing-3
items.description: Billing page with plan summary, usage bar, payment method card, and invoice history table

items.name: billing-4
items.description: A usage metering dashboard card with progress bars for seats, storage, API requests, and bandwidth, a near-limit highlight, an estimated total, and a manage-plan action.

items.name: ai-chat-3
items.description: Live AI chat built on Message, Bubble, MessageScroller, and a shimmering Marker typing indicator, with suggestion chips and a textarea composer.

items.name: onboarding-3
items.description: Multi-step setup wizard card with progress bar, step indicator, per-step fields, toggles, invites and summary

items.name: onboarding-4
items.description: A welcome onboarding empty state with a layered icon illustration, a welcome badge, a headline, a primary create-project action, a take-the-tour action, and quick reassurance hints. A first-run get-started screen.

items.name: command-palette-3
items.description: Interactive Cmd+K command palette with fuzzy search, grouped results, arrow-key navigation, and Kbd hints

items.name: command-palette-4
items.description: An inline two-column command palette with a searchable, grouped results list on the left and a live preview pane on the right showing the highlighted item's details and a primary action.

items.name: calendar-3
items.description: Interactive month/week calendar with prev/next navigation, view toggle, event chips, and an inline day panel

items.name: file-upload-3
items.description: A drag-and-drop file uploader with an Attachment list that reflects uploading, done, and error states, with validation, toasts, and remove actions.

items.name: file-upload-4
items.description: An image gallery uploader with a responsive thumbnail grid, a cover badge on the first image, per-image remove on hover, an upload tile, and an image count. For photo or asset galleries.

items.name: charts-3
items.description: Analytics area chart card with legend, hover tooltip, and a 7d/30d/90d range select that swaps the dataset

items.name: error-1
items.description: A centered 404 page with a heading, message, and home and back actions.

items.name: cookie-consent-1
items.description: A dismissible bottom cookie-consent bar with accept and decline actions and a policy link.

items.name: page-header-1
items.description: An application page header with a title, description, and action buttons.

items.name: coming-soon-1
items.description: A centered coming-soon page with a waitlist email capture and social links.

items.name: error-2
items.description: A 404 page with a search box and a list of popular pages to recover from.

items.name: error-3
items.description: A 500 error page with retry and contact-support actions and a reference code.

items.name: cookie-consent-2
items.description: A dismissible bottom-left cookie-consent card with accept, reject, and preferences.

items.name: cookie-consent-3
items.description: A cookie preferences card with toggle switches for each cookie category.

items.name: cookie-consent-4
items.description: A centered, blocking cookie-consent dialog over a dimmed page, with an icon, heading, policy link, and accept, reject, and manage actions. A modal consent gate.

items.name: page-header-2
items.description: An application page header with breadcrumbs, a status badge, and action buttons.

items.name: page-header-3
items.description: An application page header with a title, description, tabs, and a primary action.

items.name: page-header-4
items.description: A detail-view page header with a back link, title and status badge, a metadata row showing the owner avatar, created date, and a contributor avatar stack, and share and edit actions.

items.name: coming-soon-2
items.description: A split coming-soon page with a waitlist form and a framed product preview.

items.name: coming-soon-3
items.description: A coming-soon page with a live countdown timer and an email signup.

items.name: coming-soon-4
items.description: A full-bleed coming-soon hero with a subtle gradient and grid backdrop, a brand mark, a launch badge, a headline, a single-line email capture with a success state, and social links.

items.name: stats-3
items.description: A stats section with metric cards showing values and up or down deltas.

items.name: bento-3
items.description: An asymmetric bento grid with one large feature tile and supporting tiles.

items.name: timeline-1
items.description: A vertical left-rail milestone timeline. Each entry has a bordered icon node connected by a line, a monospaced date, a status badge (Shipped, In Progress, Planned), a bold title, and a line of supporting copy. Good for company history, release milestones, or an 'our journey' section.

items.name: timeline-2
items.description: A centered, two-sided timeline that alternates entries left and right of a vertical spine on desktop and collapses to a single left rail on mobile. Each entry shows a year, a tag badge, a bold title, and supporting copy. Ideal for an 'our story' or company-history section.

items.name: timeline-3
items.description: An activity timeline grouped by day, with rows of grayscale avatar, actor, action, and relative timestamp connected by a vertical rail, plus a small status icon on each avatar. A standalone feed for dashboards, profiles, or audit history.

items.name: changelog-1
items.description: A version-grouped changelog with a date and version rail on the left and Added, Improved, and Fixed change groups on the right, each with a type badge and a bulleted list. The classic release-notes layout for a marketing or docs page.

items.name: changelog-2
items.description: A tabbed changelog that filters release entries by type (All, Added, Improved, Fixed). Each entry shows a version, date, type badge, title, and description. An interactive release-notes view for docs or product pages.

items.name: changelog-3
items.description: A compact in-app 'What's New' card with a version pill, release date, and a few highlighted changes, each with a type icon and badge, plus a link to the full changelog. A product-update widget for dashboards or popovers.

items.name: changelog-4
items.description: A changelog as a vertical timeline with a connected dot rail, each release showing a version badge, date, title, and a list of color-coded added, improved, and fixed changes. A release-history feed.

items.name: roadmap-1
items.description: A three-column product roadmap board grouped by status (Planned, In Progress, Shipped). Cards carry a category badge, title, and description, plus per-status meta: a vote count when planned, a progress bar with contributor avatars when in progress, and a shipped date with avatars when done.

items.name: roadmap-2
items.description: A Now, Next, and Later roadmap with colored phase markers and a target month per phase. In-development items show a progress bar with contributor avatars while upcoming items show a vote count. A directional product roadmap.

items.name: roadmap-3
items.description: An interactive public roadmap card where visitors upvote feature requests. Each row has a vote button with a live count, a title, status and category badges, a description, and a progress bar with contributor avatars for in-development items. Good for feedback and feature-request pages.

items.name: roadmap-4
items.description: A product roadmap laid out as four quarterly columns, each listing feature cards with a category, a color-coded status icon, and a shipped, in-progress, or planned label.

items.name: article-1
items.description: A centered long-form article layout with a category badge, headline, deck, author byline with avatar and read time, a cover image, prose body with headings, a blockquote and list, and a footer with tags and share buttons. A blog post or editorial reading page.

items.name: article-2
items.description: A long-form article with a sticky table-of-contents sidebar that highlights the active section as you scroll (scroll-spy). Collapses to a single column on mobile. Ideal for documentation and in-depth guides.

items.name: article-3
items.description: A documentation article layout with a breadcrumb, title, last-updated meta, prose body with a code block, and previous/next pagination cards in the footer. A docs or knowledge-base reading page.

items.name: article-4
items.description: A wide magazine feature layout with a centered headline and deck, a byline row, a full-bleed cover image, and a drop-cap prose body with a pull quote. An editorial long-form reading page.

items.name: profile-1
items.description: A public profile page with a cover image, overlapping avatar, name and handle, bio, follower stats, a Follow toggle and Message action, and tabs for posts and about. For user, author, or member profiles.

items.name: profile-2
items.description: A compact, centered profile card with avatar, name, role, location, a three-column stat strip, and Follow and Message actions. A self-contained profile widget for sidebars, directories, or hover cards.

items.name: profile-3
items.description: An organization profile card with a logo mark, verified company name, description, a stat strip, a member avatar stack, and website and contact links. For company or team profile pages.

items.name: steps-1
items.description: A horizontal progress stepper with numbered nodes, connectors, and labels, showing completed (check), current, and upcoming states. For checkout, onboarding, or any multi-step flow header.

items.name: steps-2
items.description: A vertical stepper with numbered or checked nodes on a connecting rail, each step showing a title and description across completed, current, and upcoming states. For setup guides and onboarding checklists.

items.name: steps-3
items.description: A progress-bar step indicator showing the current step number, a percentage, a progress bar, the active step's title and description, and back and continue controls. An interactive wizard header.

items.name: activity-1
items.description: A standalone Recent Activity card with avatar rows, each showing the actor, action, target, and relative time. A workspace activity feed for dashboards and profiles.

items.name: activity-2
items.description: An activity feed grouped by day with Today and Yesterday headers, each listing avatar rows with the actor, action, target, and time. For audit trails and team activity pages.

items.name: activity-3
items.description: An audit log feed with action-type icon tiles, a two-line event title and detail, a type tag, and a timestamp. For system, security, and audit activity without avatars.

items.name: activity-4
items.description: An activity panel with All, Mentions, and Comments tabs, an unread count, and rows showing the actor avatar with a type icon, the action, target, timestamp, and an unread dot.

items.name: search-1
items.description: A faceted search panel in a bordered card: a search field header, a left sidebar of type filters with counts that interactively narrow the results, and a result list with path, title, type badge, and snippet. For docs, knowledge base, or app search.

items.name: search-2
items.description: A clean search results page with a search field, a result count, and bordered result cards showing title, type badge, snippet, and last-updated date. For site, docs, or app search.

items.name: search-3
items.description: A command-style search panel with a query field and results grouped into Pages, People, and Files, each row with an icon or avatar and meta, plus keyboard hints in the footer. An inline search-as-you-type panel.

items.name: careers-1
items.description: An open-positions list grouping roles by department, each row showing the title, location, and employment type with an Apply call to action. A clean jobs board for a careers page.

items.name: careers-2
items.description: A single job posting detail page with the role title, meta chips for department, location, and type, an About section, responsibilities and requirements lists, and apply calls to action. A full role description layout.

items.name: careers-3
items.description: A careers culture page with a headline intro, a photo strip, a three-up values grid, a perks and benefits row, and a call to action. Sells the team and life at the company rather than listing roles.

items.name: about-1
items.description: A centered about-us intro with an eyebrow badge, a bold mission statement, a supporting paragraph, and a four-metric stats strip for founded year, customers, countries, and team size.

items.name: about-2
items.description: A two-column story section pairing a grayscale team photo with a company narrative and a three-metric stats row. A founder-story layout for an about page.

items.name: status-1
items.description: A system status overview with an all-systems-operational banner and a list of services, each showing its 90-day uptime and a colored status indicator. A status-page summary.

items.name: status-2
items.description: An incident history feed grouping past incidents by date, each with an impact badge and a timeline of color-coded status updates from investigating to resolved.

items.name: status-3
items.description: A 90-day uptime monitor showing per-service daily status bars colored by health, with uptime percentages and a status legend. The classic status-page history view.

items.name: chat-1
items.description: A one-to-one chat conversation built on the Message, Bubble, Marker, and MessageScroller components, with a contact header, sender-aligned bubbles, a dated separator, auto-follow scrolling, and a working composer. A direct-message thread.

items.name: chat-2
items.description: A two-pane messenger with a selectable conversation list and an active thread built on Message, Bubble, and MessageScroller, each conversation keeping its own messages, plus a working composer. A full inbox-style chat layout.

items.name: chat-3
items.description: A live support chat widget built on Message, Bubble, Marker, and MessageScroller, with an agent header, a system marker, quick-reply chips, and a working composer. A compact help-desk panel for customer support.

items.name: chat-4
items.description: A group chat panel with a member avatar stack header, messages from multiple named senders with per-sender avatars, an online indicator, and a message composer. A team or group conversation.

items.name: saas-landing
items.description: A complete SaaS marketing homepage assembled from free blocks: hero, social proof, features, stats, testimonials, pricing, FAQ, and a closing CTA.

items.name: startup
items.description: A lean, conversion-focused landing page for early-stage startups and product waitlists: a centered hero with inline email capture, key stats, an icon feature grid, a how-it-works timeline, a featured testimonial, and a waitlist signup band.

items.name: dashboard
items.description: A logged-in app starter: a collapsible sidebar and a command-palette top bar wrapping a dashboard of stat cards, an interactive area chart, and a sortable, paginated data table.
